element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary attack throughout; player learns timing and arc
Core traversal skill; reviewers noted repetitive reliance on this mechanic
Progression gate—must collect 8/10/12 gems (by difficulty) before finding exit character

element_introduction_order.element: Friendly character encounters (Bagheera, Baloo, King Louie, Kaa)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: End-of-level objectives after gem collection; non-combat encounters tied to plot progression
Projectile-only damage mechanic; jumping does not work on bosses
Temporary protection; rewards exploration of alternate paths
Increased firing rate; rewards risk-taking in dangerous zones
Returns after hitting; useful for distant or flanking enemies

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Exploration-heavy with periodic violent interruption; 6-minute time limit per level creates sustained low-grade pressure; story chapters provide narrative punctuation between action sequences

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Gems scattered throughout level; collecting all 15 optional gems versus minimum required 8/10/12 indicates branching paths and optional areas

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic platforming, vine swinging, banana projectiles; gentle enemy encounters; low gem collection threshold
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Boss encounters intensify; powerup management becomes critical; weapon variant introduction; higher gem thresholds (medium/hard modes require 10-12 of 15)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Cumulative boss difficulty; final confrontation with Shere Khan; mastery of all weapon types and evasion tactics required
notable_spikes: Every-other-level boss encounters (combat-focused interruption of exploration rhythm)
Hard mode gem requirement (12 of 15) significantly extends exploration risk

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard level structure: explore level collecting gems until threshold met, then locate a friendly character or boss. Gems are distributed across multiple optional paths, encouraging thorough exploration.
Every other level culminates in boss fight requiring projectile-only strategy (jumping ineffective). Establishes distinct rhythm break from exploration levels.
Core traversal challenge repeated throughout; GamePro noted 'pretty repetitious, centering around ability to swing on vines.' Acts as primary pacing control mechanism.

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Jungle Book (SNES)
